Status Overview

Service test: write FAILED (read OK)

Check	Result
Working dir	/workspace (empty, no git repo)
Shell user	user
Dir owner / perms	cc:cc / drwxr-xr-x
Read/list	✅ OK
Write (harmless healthcheck.txt)	❌ EACCES permission denied

Root cause: /workspace is owned by cc with 755 perms, but the shell runs as user. Group/other have read+execute but no write, so the harmless test file couldn't be created (tried via both Write tool and touch).

No changes left behind — nothing was created. To enable writes, /workspace needs to be owned by user (or made group-writable with user in the cc group).
